channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: What is Japan’s new intelligence agency, and why is Tokyo building it?
item.description: Japan plans to launch its first centralised intelligence body with help from Western allies.

item.title: What will happen to Trump’s agenda after Lindsey Graham’s death?
item.description: Graham, an ex-Trump critic, had turned into staunch supporter of the US president’s domestic and international policies.

item.title: The late Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani’s legacy on women’s reform
item.description: Qatar's late Emir Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani’s 18-year rule brought pivotal changes towards women empowerment.

item.title: Street in Illinois named after murdered Palestinian boy
item.description: A street in the US state of Illinois has been named after a six year old Palestinian American boy who was killed.

item.title: March to July: What’s different as US-Iran fighting escalates again?
item.description: With ceasefire in shambles and both sides exchanging tit-for-tat attacks, is the region again plunging into all-out war?

item.title: South Korea rolls out plan to tackle youth suicide crisis
item.description: South Korea rolls out plan to tackle youth suicide crisis

item.title: Al Jazeera bids farewell to founder Sheikh Hamad
item.description: Al Jazeera bids farewell to founder Sheikh Hamad

item.title: Yemen government says its forces attacked Sanaa airport
item.description: Gov't says its forces carried out a strike at Sanaa airport to prevent an Iranian aircraft from landing there.

item.title: Will the 2030 World Cup expand to 64 teams? What FIFA’s Infantino says
item.description: FIFA president says during the first World Cup to feature 48 teams that it's under consideration.

item.title: EU countries consider sanctions on trade from illegal Israeli settlements
item.description: Pressure from EU member states to impose sanctions has increased in recent months amid escalating settler violence.

item.title: France vs Spain: World Cup semifinal – Mbappe, Yamal, predictions, kickoff
item.description: Kylian Mbappe's France continue their quest for the world title, facing Lamine Yamal's Spain in a blockbuster semifinal.

item.title: Wildfires near Paris force evacuations, disrupt train lines and motorway
item.description: Wildfires spread over 800 hectares near Fontainebleau, as authorities sent two ​waterbombing planes to tackle blazes.

item.title: ‘It’s expensive’: Syria’s electricity has improved, but challenges remain
item.description: Damascus residents say state-supplied power has noticeably improved recently but complain about the cost of energy.

item.title: Explosions and large fires following Ukrainian attacks on Russia
item.description: Explosions and large fires following Ukrainian attacks on Russia

item.title: New Iran strikes on Gulf as US attacks escalate: What we know
item.description: Iran targets its Gulf neighbours in third round of tit-for-tat attacks with US in a week.

item.title: In Wales, an artist sews names of Gaza’s infant victims on christening gown
item.description: Diana Williams embroiders names of 300 babies killed by Israel on gown, an evocative work she hopes will reach New York.

item.title: US and Iran trade strikes as ceasefire comes under growing strain
item.description: Iran's IRGC says it attacked sites linked to the US military in Kuwait, Bahrain and Oman after latest US bombardment.

item.title: Typhoon Bavi pummels China’s eastern coast
item.description: Dramatic video captured the moment waves caused by Typhoon Bavi slammed into a house in China’s Zhejiang province.

item.title: Watch World Cup: Preview ahead of Spain-France semifinal 1
item.description: Latest match highlights, reaction and previews from the FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America.

item.title: More than 2,700 deaths in UK linked to May, June heatwaves
item.description: The UK has experienced two record heatwaves this year, with temperatures reaching 35.1C in May and 37.7C in June.

item.title: Kimmit: Renewed US-Iran fighting could reignite wider regional conflict
item.description: Retired US General Mark Kimmitt warns renewed attacks in the Strait of Hormuz could push the US and Iran

item.title: In Iran, Pezeshkian will be the scapegoat for the failed MoU
item.description: Putting all the blame on the Iranian president covers up tensions between competing factions in Tehran.

item.title: FIFA World Cup: Which semifinal team has best chance to win the trophy?
item.description: Form guide on the final four teams as they battle it out for the FIFA World Cup 2026 trophy in the United States.

item.title: Jurassic Park actor Sam Neill dies aged 78
item.description: Death of New Zealand actor in Sydney was 'sudden and unexpected', according to a family statement.

item.title: Sheikh Hamad: The Arab leader who broke Israel’s siege on Gaza
item.description: A look at Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani's enduring legacy of solidarity and support for the Palestinian people.
